response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. No PhD/Master's in a hardware-relevant field and no demonstrated performance architecture work on AI accelerators. The gap between background and requirements is too large for a Principal-level IC role.
strengths: Long track record as a senior/staff software engineer across diverse stacks
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang microservices and C/C++ at National Instruments
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, public talks
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, or GPU architecture experience
No deep learning training/inference optimization or SIMD/MIMD background
Education and experience do not match Principal-level hardware performance architect requirements

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU architecture or DNN optimization background
Solid senior software engineering track record
